---
description: "Academic CV: education, positions, publications, talks, grants, and teaching."
title: "CV"
---

[The complete academic record as a single PDF.]{.lead-line}

## Curriculum vitae

[Download PDF](assets/CV_Oliver_Frings.pdf){.pill}

<iframe src="assets/CV_Oliver_Frings.pdf" width="100%" height="900"></iframe>
